prompt: HD pixel art casino scene, 1024x1024. A massive steel bank vault safe with a circular combination dial in the center. The dial has numbers around it in gold. One lock mechanism partially cracked with light leaking through. A countdown timer displayed above in red LED-style numbers. Tools scattered on the floor. Clean sharp pixel edges, flat color blocks, visible pixel grid. Dark basement atmosphere with a single overhead bulb. Casino noir heist vibe.
